scripts.build: rm -rf src/shared && cp -r ../shared/officialResults src/shared && rm -f src/shared/*.test.ts && mkdir -p src/shared/shares && cp ../shared/shares/*.ts src/shared/shares && rm -f src/shared/shares/*.test.ts && mkdir -p src/shared/reminders && cp ../shared/reminders/*.ts src/shared/reminders && rm -f src/shared/reminders/*.test.ts && tsc
